message:
feat(ui): add clickable search suggestion hit regions and extract last_path_component helper

Clickable suggestions (Did-you-mean):
- New last_suggestion_rects: RefCell<Vec<(Rect, usize)>> field on
  CassApp that tracks the bounding rectangle and 1-based index of
  each rendered search suggestion line
- Hero state rendering: compute suggestion_areas from estimated y
  offsets and centered x positions using display_width(), store in
  last_suggestion_rects for subsequent mouse hit testing
- Zero-results rendering: same pattern with rendered_suggestions
  Vec for deferred area computation after the paragraph is laid out
- MouseHitRegion::Suggestion { idx: usize } variant added to the
  hit-region enum
- resolve_mouse_hit_region() checks last_suggestion_rects before
  falling through to pane-aware row testing

last_path_component() helper:
- Extract the filename from a path string, supporting both / and \
  separators. Previously, each call site used .rsplit('/').next()
  which missed Windows paths and required .unwrap_or() boilerplate.
- Used in ResultsGrouping::Conversation and ResultsGrouping::Workspace
  to replace inline rsplit calls

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
